message:
feat(v2): full Ink TUI — React terminal UI matching Claude Code

Status bar: model, context%, cost, time, permission mode
Tool execution: spinner + colored output
Thinking blocks: dim italic
Code blocks: bordered with syntax highlighting
Permission prompts: interactive y/n/a
Markdown rendering: bold, italic, code, lists, headings, tables, links
Keyboard shortcuts: Escape, Ctrl+C, Ctrl+L
Fallback to readline REPL if Ink unavailable

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -3,13 +3,43 @@
   "version": "2.0.0",
   "description": "Open source Claude Code CLI — based on ruDevolution decompilation of v2.1.91",
   "type": "module",
-  "bin": { "occ": "src/index.mjs" },
-  "files": ["src/", "test/"],
+  "bin": {
+    "occ": "src/index.mjs"
+  },
+  "files": [
+    "src/",
+    "test/"
+  ],
   "scripts": {
     "start": "node src/index.mjs",
     "test": "node test/test.mjs"
   },
-  "keywords": ["claude", "code", "cli", "ai", "decompiler", "open-source"],
+  "keywords": [
+    "claude",
+    "code",
+    "cli",
+    "ai",
+    "decompiler",
+    "open-source"
+  ],
   "license": "MIT",
-  "repository": "https://github.com/ruvnet/open-claude-code"
+  "repository": {
+    "type": "git",
+    "url": "git+https://github.com/ruvnet/open-claude-code.git"
+  },
+  "bugs": {
+    "url": "https://github.com/ruvnet/open-claude-code/issues"
+  },
+  "homepage": "https://github.com/ruvnet/open-claude-code#readme",
+  "main": "index.js",
+  "directories": {
+    "test": "test"
+  },
+  "author": "",
+  "dependencies": {
+    "ink": "^5.2.1",
+    "ink-spinner": "^5.0.0",
+    "ink-text-input": "^6.0.0",
+    "react": "^18.3.1"
+  }
 }
